description: The ``TimeSpan Total Milliseconds`` node takes in a TimeSpan and returns with the amount of milliseconds in that TimeSpan, including the fractional portion of a millisecond, as well as anything longer than a millisecond will be added into the total.

fields.TimeSpan: The TimeSpan we are getting info from.
fields.* ([[Type:double|double]]): Returns the amount of milliseconds in this TimeSpan as an double.
